title: Conformity Is Comely.
content:
Conformity gives comeliness to things:
    And equal shares exclude all murmurings.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Conformity Is Comely.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
